---
title: "Roadmap"
---

How every module depends on the others. Blue nodes are reusable
[foundations](../../foundations/README.md) modules shared across courses; arrows
mean "needed for".

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef foundation fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4

    F1["vectors-and-summation<br/>(x_i, n, Σ, sum rules)"]:::foundation
    F2["mean-variance-covariance<br/>(x̄, s², cov, cor)"]:::foundation
    M1["01 · Lines & the least-squares idea<br/>(β₀, β₁, ŷ, residuals, SSE, argmin)"]
    M2["02 · Deriving the OLS formulas<br/>(the calc tricks + the derivation)"]
    M3["03 · Reading lm() output & papers<br/>(SE, t, p, R², paper tables)"]
    M4["04 · Capstone<br/>(decode a real regression, end to end)"]

    F1 --> F2
    F1 --> M1
    F2 --> M1
    F2 --> M2
    M1 --> M2
    M2 --> M3
    M3 --> M4
```

## Suggested order

1. Foundation: [vectors-and-summation](../../foundations/vectors-and-summation/lesson.qmd) —
   new? take it fully; done before? skim its pronunciation table.
2. Foundation: [mean-variance-covariance](../../foundations/mean-variance-covariance/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
3. [01 · Lines and the least-squares idea](modules/01-least-squares-idea/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/01-least-squares-idea/practice.qmd))
4. [02 · Deriving the OLS formulas](modules/02-deriving-the-ols-formulas/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/02-deriving-the-ols-formulas/practice.qmd))
5. [03 · Reading lm() output and papers](modules/03-reading-lm-output-and-papers/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/03-reading-lm-output-and-papers/practice.qmd))
6. [04 · Capstone — reading a real regression](modules/04-capstone-reading-a-real-regression/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/04-capstone-reading-a-real-regression/practice.qmd))

After each lesson, do its practice page before moving on — the problems are the part
that makes it stick. External videos/posts for each module: [resources](resources.md).
